content: pgvector filtered vector search: pgvector HNSW post-filters — scans ef_search candidates then applies WHERE, so selective permission filters return fewer than k results and recall collapses when the allowed fraction is small (~1%). Mitigations: pgvector 0.8+ iterative index scans, partial indexes, pre-filter to exact scan on small allowed sets, or oversampling. Sources: dev.to/mongodb, yudhiesh.github.io, clarvo.ai, arxiv filtered-ANN surveys.
